content:
Been building this for a year. Inspired by Concourse but simpler to deploy, start with one binary, no external dependencies. Add a database and distributed workers when you need to scale. The pipeline config never changes.
Key features:
- Five pluggable abstractions: resource types, runners, service types, secret backends, notification types. All sourceable from a URL.
- Services: ephemeral processes (Postgres, Redis, anything) that run alongside your tasks. No Docker-in-Docker.
- Local pipeline execution: run any job on your laptop without a server.
- Works with any git host: not tied to GitHub, GitLab, or any specific VCS.
- Graph and list pipeline views with version tracking.
PikoCI deploys itself, the live pipeline is publicly visible at http://ci.pikoci.com/teams/main/pipelines/pikoci, no login needed.
http://pikoci.com · http://github.com/pikoci/pikoci · Apache 2.0

  submitted by   /u/xescugc
